name: Sausage Supper Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, cook sausages for 10 minutes, turning once until browned.
2. In a large bowl, combine pancake mix, milk, eggs and butter; stir gently just to moisten.
3. Stir in corn.
4. Pour mixture into a greased baking dish measuring 9 x 13 inches (3L).
5. Place sausages on top of the mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes.
7. Cut into squares and drizzle with maple syrup.
